purpose: Provide the repository-owned objective contract used by AgentSwitchboard to start one bounded Good Night, Have Fun process in a dedicated native-Windows WezTerm panel.

rules: prove the exact agent route before unattended work
commit a finite queue before code repair
keep stateful game work in code tests fixtures and safe reports
close existing overnight work without starting another feature

stageSelection.stopWhen: The queue checkpoint, up to three bounded repair dispositions, and the closeout are committed in order, deterministic validation is recorded, personal and live game state remain untouched, and the generated GNHF worktree is clean.
The finite night queue and baseline report are committed, every item has an exact validation command, and the generated GNHF worktree is clean.

Up to three ready code-level items are committed or blocked with evidence, the queue and report are current, deterministic validation is recorded, personal and live game state remain untouched, and the generated GNHF worktree is clean.
Every queue item is dispositioned, the validation state and proof ceiling are recorded, the closeout report is committed, and the generated GNHF worktree is clean.

forbidden: launch Bannerlord during an unattended code repair stage
mutate personal saves accounts inventories currencies purchases or cloud state
push merge release deploy authenticate or access credentials
treat process exit zero configured stop text or a checkpoint as delivery proof
run multiple repositories in one GNHF process
erase interrupted worktrees branches logs notes or unknown partial state
